strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience with consistent senior Node.js/TypeScript depth across multiple product companies
Current role at re:cinq includes AI agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, directly matching the AI agent development requirement
Strong testing culture — created testing libraries, led TDD workshops, applied TDD/CI/CD/trunk-based development in production at RIDE Capital
concerns: Nest.js is absent from the resume despite it being a primary stack requirement; Node.js experience is deep but framework fit is unverified
Kotlin is not mentioned; Java appears only in embedded and robotics contexts, not modern backend service development
Jest, Vitest, and Playwright are not named explicitly, and React depth appears limited relative to backend and Node.js expertise
response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine seniority and exceptional breadth — over 15 years of full-stack work, consistent TypeScript and Node.js across multiple companies, AWS and Kubernetes exposure, MongoDB and MySQL experience, and a rare combination of strong testing culture with current hands-on AI agent development. His present role at re:cinq maps almost directly to the job description. The primary gaps are Nest.js (unmentioned despite deep Node.js background) and Kotlin (absent outside embedded contexts), but these carry low risk given his demonstrated ability to adopt new tools quickly and the fact that Kotlin is listed only as a secondary technology.
